    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Admin
    A class representing an Admin User.
    Booking
    A Booking Record.
    BookingController
    Controller class used for the booking screen.
    BookingCreateController
    Controller class used for creating or editing an existing Booking.
    BookingModel
    Class used to display Booking's in the app.
    BookingRepository
     
    BookingService
    Service used to manage Booking's in the app.
    DatabaseException
     
    DatabaseUtils
    A utility class for interacting with the database.
    Guest
    A Guest Record.
    GuestComponentController
    A controller used for displaying a custom Guest component.
    GuestController
    Controller class used for the Guest view.
    GuestCreateController
    Controller class used for Guest creating and editing.
    GuestModel
    Class used to display Guest's in the app.
    GuestRepository
     
    GuestSearchController
    Controller used for searching and selecting Guest's.
    GuestService
    A service used to manage guests in the app.
    HeaderController
     
    HelloApplication
     
    History
    A class used for writhing the history of the changes in the app.
    HistoryComponentController
    Controller used for displaying a custom History component.
    HistoryController
    Controller used to controlle the history view.
    HistoryRecordLog
    A Record Class used to represent the log in History.
    HistoryRecordLogModel
    Class used to display HistoryRecordLog entries in the app.
    HotelStaffAccount
    A class representing an HotelStaffAccount User.
    IncorrectPasswordException
     
    Launcher
     
    LoginController
     
    LoginService
    A service used to manage login's and active users in the app.
    Modal<C,R>
    Class used to display a modal view in the app.
    Modal.ModalBuilder<C,R>
    Builder class used for creating Modal objects.
    NotLoggedInException
     
    PasswordUtils
     
    Repository<E>
    An interface for repositories.
    Room
    Class representing a room
    Room.Amenity
     
    Room.RoomBuilder
    RoomBuilder - using builder pattern.
    RoomComponentController
    A controller used for displaying a custom Room component.
    RoomController
    Controller used for the room view.
    RoomCreateController
     
    RoomModel
     
    RoomRepository
     
    RoomSearchController
     
    RoomService
    The service which will be used to manage Room's in the app.
    User
    An abstract class representing a User of the application.
    UserNotFoundException
     
    UsersRepository
     
    ValidatingTextField
    A custom TextField that can validate input.
    ViewManager
     
    ViewManager.ViewPath
